seo.title: Mortgage Broker New Jersey | NJ Home Loans & Refinance
seo.description: New Jersey mortgage broker for purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, Non-QM & investment. Bergen, Essex, Hudson & more. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Mortgage Broker in New Jersey
hero.subheading: NJ purchase and refinance mortgages — conventional, FHA, VA, bank statement, and investment programs with a licensed broker.

intro.heading: Helping New Jersey Borrowers
paragraphs: If you searched for a mortgage broker in new jersey, home loans nearby, or a mortgage broker near me in this area, Green Street Capital can help. We are a licensed mortgage broker (NMLS #2066586) offering purchase, refinance, and specialty programs through multiple lenders.

From North Jersey commuter towns to shore communities and growing suburbs, New Jersey buyers need financing that matches local property types and income situations. Green Street Capital is licensed in New Jersey and helps clients compare conventional, government-backed, and specialty programs.
We focus on transparent monthly payment estimates and documentation that keeps underwriting moving.
bullets: First-time buyers purchasing single-family homes and condos
Move-up families needing larger homes or better school districts
Self-employed borrowers exploring bank statement options
Homeowners refinancing for rate or cash-out goals
Investors financing rentals with DSCR-style programs

sidebar.heading: NJ Licensing
sidebar.body: Licensed with the New Jersey Department of Banking and Insurance. Loans arranged with third-party lenders. NMLS #2066586.

market.heading: New Jersey Market Notes
paragraphs: Property taxes and insurance can meaningfully change affordability. We help you underwrite the full payment, not just the note rate.
Commuter patterns and town-by-town pricing mean local comps and timelines vary—pre-approval still wins when inventory is tight.

faqs.question: Are you licensed in New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are licensed with the NJ Department of Banking and Insurance.

faqs.question: Can New Jersey borrowers use Non-QM programs?
faqs.answer: When available through our lender partners, we can explore Non-QM and bank statement options for qualified borrowers.

faqs.question: How do I contact you from NJ?
faqs.answer: Call 855-615-4545 or 718-615-4545, email Info@GSCMortgage.com, or apply via our Team page.

faqs.question: Are you a licensed mortgage broker in New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital works with New Jersey borrowers as a licensed mortgage broker (NMLS #2066586). Loans are arranged with third-party lenders.

faqs.question: Can I get an FHA loan in New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Many NJ buyers and properties qualify for FHA. We check eligibility for your purchase.

faqs.question: Do you refinance New Jersey mortgages?
faqs.answer: Yes — rate-and-term and cash-out when equity and income support a refinance.

faqs.question: Which NJ counties do you serve?
faqs.answer: We commonly help borrowers in Bergen, Hudson, Essex, Passaic, Union, Middlesex, Morris, and other counties where programs apply.

cta.heading: Start your New Jersey mortgage
cta.body: Choose a loan officer and begin your application with a team that serves New Jersey.
